description:
"I'll see you free. I want your ego."
( ✦ ) Blue Lock: Rivals - Roblox

Yeah so this was a request from a friend in me and Anon's server, and I was bored enough to do it. If you want to leave a review, go ahead, if you leave a review under that review, you can leave another review where you put bot suggestions, I may or not do them depending on if I can find an interesting image for it.

If you're a male, I made it so it's a mixed league, I don't care if it doesn't make any sense, motherfuckers in blue lock have monsters and can cause tornados with their kicks, and it was either that or locking it to fem Pov.
